title: Music Continue
description: Keeps Minecraft music playing when you leave a world for the menu, and smoothly fades menu music out when you join back in.
body: Music Continue keeps the currently playing in-game music going when you leave a world and return to the main menu, so songs don’t get awkwardly cut off mid-track. It also preserves normal menu music behavior when no world music is playing, and smoothly fades menu music out when you join or load into a world. Purely client-side.
